title: Prototype Chamber
description: A plain stone chamber used for early server testing.

title: South Market
description: A sheltered trade nook of canvas awnings and tidy crates opens here, warm with lamplight and the scent of oil and leather.

title: Northern Hall
description: A narrow hall of cold stone extends here, quiet and still.

title: Eastern Watch
description: A long watch corridor lit by guttering iron braziers and scarred by old blade marks.

title: Whispering Sanctum
description: Rune-etched stone and drifting embers hum with unstable arcane current.
